title: Go Messaging Observability, Capacity, and Alarms · Guided Systems Studio
summary: A Go pairing room incrementally implements a low-cardinality messaging telemetry and capacity plan, first with deterministic values and then with a changed failure, while keeping prior messaging invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a low-cardinality messaging telemetry and capacity plan while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Interpret ready, unacknowledged, total, ingress, delivery, ack, redelivery, consumers, consumer capacity, connections, channels, and node resource metrics together; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Model arrival rate, service rate, concurrency, oldest age, burst, retry amplification, byte volume, and recovery time for capacity decisions; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Message Flow Telemetry
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go messaging team handles case 3276 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine backlog, age, alarm, consumer, and bounded-capacity evidence; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then close the owning channel before one delivery decision. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Message Flow Telemetry.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Message Flow Telemetry, keep Message Flow Telemetry connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Audit the initial evidence packet · Workshop Messaging Slo Alert
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go messaging team handles case 4895 during canary Go consumer decoding old and new envelopes. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine backlog, age, alarm, consumer, and bounded-capacity evidence; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability.
